headline: How The Intel (INTC) Narrative Is Shifting With Advanced Packaging And Data Center Uncertainty
summary: Intel's updated model holds the fair value estimate essentially steady at US$47.11 versus US$47.12, signaling only a tiny shift in the price target despite a fresh pass at the numbers. That small move sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst research, where some highlight potential upside from advanced packaging and data center demand, while others flag execution risk and already full expectations. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these threads and track the next turns in Intel's...
